response.justification: While the candidate meets the foundational requirement of 15 years in software engineering and possesses valuable entrepreneurial experience, their profile aligns more with a Staff Full-Stack Developer than a Director-level AI Strategist. Their AI exposure is very recent and implementation-focused, lacking the deep, recognized AI industry expertise and executive-level strategic advisory experience required for this Principal role.
strengths: Over 15 years of software engineering and cloud infrastructure experience
Entrepreneurial background with founder and open-source leadership
Recent hands-on exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and tooling
concerns: Seniority falls short of a Director-level individual contributor
Lacks deep, recognized AI/ML expertise and long-term AI product history
No demonstrated experience advising strategic enterprise customers
